subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God and the God of all creation, my Beloved and the Beloved of the universe! Thou seest a leaf from amongst Thy leaves
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و اله الممکنات و محبوبی و محبوب الکائنات تری ورقه من اوراقک قد
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
